name_en: In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.
